---
title: "`r params$title`"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
eval_ex <- TRUE
eval_sol <- FALSE
eval_learnr <- TRUE

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE)
```


```{r, child = params$content}
```
